details.note: All assets are code-drawn via Canvas 2D API. No external resources. CTA uses window.open() which is allowed.

Game starts in 'title' state and requires user tap to begin. Level transitions after win/fail use setTimeout(1500ms) to auto-advance - this is acceptable for result screens. Core gameplay requires drag input.

CONFIG.ctaUrl is defined but not wired to the CTA button - button hardcodes the URL in HTML onclick. Both values match ('https://example.com/store') but CONFIG.ctaUrl is dead code. URL is a placeholder and must be replaced before production.
File is 25.94 KB, well within all platform limits. Uses requestAnimationFrame exclusively. RAF loop correctly terminates when state === 'cta'.

feedbacks.description: CTA URL 'https://example.com/store' is a placeholder value. Both CONFIG.ctaUrl and the button's inline onclick contain this placeholder.
feedbacks.suggestion: Replace 'https://example.com/store' with the actual store URL (e.g., App Store or Google Play link) before production deployment. Also wire the button onclick to use CONFIG.ctaUrl for single-source configuration: onclick="window.open(CONFIG.ctaUrl,'_blank')"

feedbacks.description: CONFIG.ctaUrl is defined at line 42 but is never referenced by any code. The CTA button at line 26 hardcodes the URL directly in the HTML onclick attribute.
feedbacks.suggestion: Remove the dead CONFIG.ctaUrl property or wire the button to use it. Keeping CONFIG as the single source of truth makes the URL easier to update.

feedbacks.description: Level transitions after win/fail states auto-advance after 1500ms via setTimeout without requiring additional user input (lines 362-384 in checkLevelEnd()).
feedbacks.suggestion: This is industry-standard behavior for result screens and does not violate the no-auto-play rule since core gameplay still requires explicit drag input. No change required, but consider adding a 'tap to continue' prompt for stricter platforms.

feedbacks.description: All graphics are rendered via Canvas 2D API using programmatic drawing. No image assets, fonts from CDN, or any external resources are loaded.
feedbacks.suggestion: No action required. This is an ideal self-contained implementation.

networkCompliance.note: File size 25.94 KB is well below all platform limits (Facebook: 2MB, others: 5MB)
